pages.text: After some time, you will certainly feel that your followers' strength has fallen far behind yours, while the protection provided by the Guide to Feral Hunt is no longer enough.$(br2)So, you found a new use for Twisted Hearts.
pages.title: Sanguinary Hunting

pages.text: This handbook lets your followers master new abilities and receive part of the violent power carried by you.$(br2)Let them listen to the proverbs in the handbook and dedicate their lives without hesitation.
pages.title: Violent Doctrine

pages.text: The handbook is crafted by strengthening the Guide to Feral Hunt with Twisted Heart, netherite, ghast tears, dragon breath, and phantom membranes.
